source.description: Global earthquake events combining NOAA NGDC Significant Earthquakes database (historical events with damage/casualties) and USGS real-time earthquake data. Includes magnitude, depth, impact data, and aftershock relationships.

metrics.depth_km: Depth of earthquake hypocenter in kilometers
metrics.felt_radius_km: Estimated radius where earthquake was felt
metrics.deaths: Number of deaths attributed to the earthquake
metrics.injuries: Number of injuries attributed to the earthquake
metrics.damage_millions: Estimated damage in millions of USD

geographic_context.focus: Earthquakes with recorded damage, casualties, or magnitude 4.0+

data_quality_notes: Historical events (pre-1900) may have estimated magnitudes and locations
Deaths/injuries/damage only recorded for significant events
Aftershock relationships computed from spatial-temporal clustering
tsunami_event_id and volcano_event_id link to related disaster events
